description_long: This is a round, vintage-style teapot with a white enamel body adorned with pink floral patterns on its sides. The teapot features a short, slightly angled spout and a large, black, angular metal handle attached at two points on the top. The lid is circular, metallic, and topped with a black knob, fitting snugly into the opening. The surface shows signs of wear, including minor stains and chips, suggesting frequent use. The floral motif is prominent and adds a decorative, homey touch to the otherwise utilitarian object. The overall design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for serving tea in a domestic or casual urban setting.
description: A round, white enamel teapot with pink floral patterns, a black angular handle, and a metallic lid with a black knob. The teapot shows signs of wear and is both decorative and functional.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from the side, showing the spout protruding and a partial view of the floral pattern, with the handle and lid clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main floral pattern on the body, the spout, and the full angular handle, giving a clear look at the decorative side.
description_view_2: The back of the teapot is visible, showing the handle's attachment and a mostly plain white surface with minimal floral detail.
description_view_3: The teapot is shown from an angle that displays both the spout and the main floral pattern, with the handle arching above.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned on the side of the main body.
attribute_handle_design: Large, thick, angular black metal handle attached at two points on the top, forming a squared arch above the lid.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; circular metallic lid with a black knob, fits snugly on top.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral patterns with pink flowers and green leaves on the sides, contrasting with the white enamel background.
